name: Root Beer Stand Coney Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a seasoned skillet, brown the ground beef with onion over medium heat, breaking it up until crumbly.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except ketchup to the skillet and mix well.
4. Gradually add enough ketchup to keep the mixture loose as it cooks.
5. Simmer partially covered, adding more ketchup as needed.
